_comment: Cursor hooks. Copy to .cursor/hooks.json. CLAUDE_HARNESS=cursor switches the session-start JSON shape. Schema matches Claude Code CLI v2.1+ (nested hooks array with type:command). Cursor's PreToolUse contract may differ — verify hook fires before relying on it.

PreToolUse._comment: Optional gate on rules/agent-behavior.md edits. Remove this matcher block to disable.
